title: About Matt Vickers | Matt Vickers
meta_description: Matt Vickers is Stockton born and bred. He loves our area and want to make life even better for local people.
headings: h2: A history serving Stockton West
h3: Matt Vickers MP for Stockton South
text_excerpt: About Matt Vickers | Matt Vickers Skip to main content Matt Vickers MP MP for Stockton West Main navigation Home About Matt Get in touch News In Parliament Getting Things Done Volunteer Matt Vickers MP MP for Stockton West About Matt About Matt Vickers Tweet Matt has a track record of standing up for Stockton ever since being proudly elected in 2019. Stockton born and bred and proud of it, Matt is driven by a genuine love of our area and will continue to work day and night to stand up for Stockton West. Born at North Tees, the son of a builder and a hairdresser, he has stacked shelves, pulled pints and laid bricks in Stockton West. Born locally, raised locally and educated locally, he knows the problems our area faces and is determined to solve them. Matt has a history in politics, having acted as constituency agent for titans of the political scene Matt knows how to get his point across. First working for William Hague and later running Former Prime Minister Rishi Sunak's successful election campaign, Matt was first elected as MP for Stockton South in 2019 and gave Teesside a known name in places of Government. Having acted as councillor for Hartburn Ward and led the opposition on Stockton-on-Tees Borough Council since May 2015, Matt has been working for the people of Stockton West for nearly a decade. Standing up for our Local high streets, Matt campaigned against the overdevelopment, crowding and congestion of towns and villages throughout Stockton and Yarm without the sustainable development to go with the growth. Having came from a background in retail and business, Matt has the interests of our highstreets and towns at heart and the solutions to go with it. Matt has taken every opportunity to visit constituents, local businesses and see the work of local residents and cannot wait to continue doing so as the MP for Stockton West. It's the best part of the job! Meet Matt If you want to know more about who Matt is, be sure to follow Matt on Facebook , Twitter and Instagram . A history serving Stockton West Conservative MP for Stockton West Proudly re-elected as MP for the new Stockton West constituency in July 2024. Appointed Shadow Minister of State for Crime, Police, and Fire. Conservative MP for Stockton South Proudly elected as MP for Stockton South in December 2019 Deputy Chairman of the Conservative Party since 2022 Standing to be MP for the new constituency of Stockton West in the 2024 General Election Chairman of the future of retail APPG. Chairman of Stockton Conservatives During his tenure as a councillor was the leader of the Conservative group on the council, campaigning against overdevelopment and for suitable parking facilities. Representing Hartburn Ward Represented Hartburn Ward on the Stockton-on-Tees Borough Council from May 2015 until April 2021.
